name: mcdmarketprime
description: MCD Market Prime - Comparador de Preços e Ofertas

scripts.minify-css: cleancss -o css/base.min.css css/base.css && cleancss -o css/components.min.css css/components.css && cleancss -o css/admin.min.css css/admin.css && cleancss -o css/blog.min.css css/blog.css
scripts.build: npm run minify-css && npm run minify-js
